title: Simple Craft
description:
its a simple data pack for recipes
19 simple recipes that can help to get material easily
7 furnace recipes and 12 crafting table recipes.
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you "SIMPLE CRAFT" pack.
its is a simple recipes Data pack
this add some simple recipes in minecraft
19 simple recipes that can help to get material easily
7 furnace recipes and 12 crafting table recipes.

all in recipes are-

1)chorus fruit  
2)cow spawn egg  
3)creeper spawn egg  
4)diamond  
5)emerald  
6)ender dragon spawn egg [1.20+version needed]  
7)enderman spawn egg  
8)evoker Spawn egg  
9)gold ingot  
10)iron golem spawn egg  
11)iron ingot  
12)netherite scrap  
13)potato  
14)sheep spawn egg  
15)skeleton spawn egg  
16)spawner  
17)totem  
18)villager spawn egg  
19)zombie spawn egg  


This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files.


Enjoy the "Simple Craft" Data Pack.


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
